title: Cross-venue market comparison, Kalshi vs Polymarket (2026-07-21)
text:
Cross-venue liquidity on Kalshi vs Polymarket: Kalshi lists "Will Phil Murphy be the Democratic Presidential nominee in 2028?" (KXPRESNOMD-28-PHI) and Polymarket lists "Will Phil Murphy win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?" (559680); these appear to be the same question. 99% of the $114k combined 24h volume is on Polymarket. It trades at 0.1c on Kalshi and 0.4c on Polymarket.

Cross-venue liquidity on Kalshi vs Polymarket: Kalshi lists "Will John Fetterman be the Democratic Presidential nominee in 2028?" (KXPRESNOMD-28-JF) and Polymarket lists "Will John Fetterman win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?" (559673); these appear to be the same question. 96% of the $54k combined 24h volume is on Polymarket. It trades at 0.2c on Kalshi and 0.3c on Polymarket.

Cross-venue liquidity on Kalshi vs Polymarket: The market "Will Yair Golan be the next Prime Minister of Israel?" is listed on both venues (Kalshi KXNEXTISRAELPM-45JAN01-YGOL, Polymarket 682712). 100% of the $52k combined 24h volume is on Polymarket. It trades at 1.0c on Kalshi and 0.2c on Polymarket.
